description: Owner @mentions the bot on an issue timeline comment. The `author_association=OWNER` is in the default allowlist, so onComment returns { auth } and the model dispatches as a chat-reply turn.

issue.title: [Bug] callGitHub does not retry on 502
issue.body:
## Steps to reproduce

1. Set `GITHUB_APP_ID` to a valid ID.
2. Call `callGitHub(ctx, "GET", "/repos/foo/bar`)` against a repo whose App installation returns 502.
3. Observe: the call throws `GitHubApiError` immediately rather than retrying.

## Expected behavior

The call should retry on transient 5xx up to 3 times with exponential backoff.

## Environment

- agent/agent.ts
- Node 24
- Windows 11 / pnpm 9

comment.body: @eve-triage can you take a look at this?

expected.rationale: Owner role is in the default allowlist (OWNER, COLLABORATOR, MEMBER). Mention turns dispatch as chat replies (no triage marker, no label mutation).
